page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2ne.16xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 64 dedicated physical cores using Intel Xeon 8163 processors operating at a base frequency of 2.5 GHz. The system is equipped with 512.0 GB of system memory, providing an allocation of 8.0 GB of RAM per core. For local storage, the instance includes a bundled 15,358 GB local SSD array, offering high-capacity, low-latency storage directly attached to the host.

The instance provides a baseline network bandwidth of 20 Gbps to support high-throughput data transfers. Because the CPU allocation is dedicated with a 1:1 ratio of physical cores to vCPUs, it avoids resource contention issues common in hyper-threaded environments. From a cost-efficiency perspective, the integration of massive local SSD storage alongside a high memory-to-vCPU ratio makes this instance highly resource-dense, reducing the need for external block storage attachments for data-intensive operations.

Given its hardware profile, the ecs.i2ne.16xlarge is designed for storage-heavy and memory-intensive workloads. It is highly suitable for large-scale relational databases, NoSQL databases, distributed file systems, and big data analytics pipelines that require rapid access to large local datasets. The combination of 512 GB of RAM and over 15 TB of local SSD storage also supports demanding transactional processing and caching layers.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2ne.16xlarge is a high-capacity storage and memory-optimized server instance built on the x86_64 architecture and KVM hypervisor. It is equipped with 64 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 physical cores running at 2.5 GHz, with a single thread per core to ensure consistent, non-shared compute performance. The instance features 512.0 GB of RAM, translating to 8.0 GB of memory per core, and includes a massive 15,358 GB local SSD storage array. With a baseline network bandwidth of 20 Gbps, this instance is designed to handle data-intensive applications without relying on external storage. The resource-dense configuration provides qualitative cost efficiency for workloads requiring high local IOPS and large memory footprints. It is highly suited for large-scale databases, distributed file systems, and transactional processing applications.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2ne.16xlarge is a storage-optimized instance featuring 64 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 512 GB of RAM, and a 15,358 GB local SSD array for demanding database and big data workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.i2ne.16xlarge features 64 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 512 GB RAM, and 15,358 GB of local SSD storage for data-intensive workloads.
tagline: A dedicated sixty-four core server featuring over fifteen terabytes of local SSD storage and half a terabyte of memory for data-intensive workloads.
bullet_points: 64 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 physical cores with single-thread execution.
512.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core.
15,358 GB of bundled local SSD storage for low-latency data access.
20 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for high-throughput data transfers.
Optimized for large-scale databases, NoSQL platforms, and distributed file systems.
